_comment: Per-PR demo manifest for #486 -- testudo overhead-cover & shield-wall stance visuals. Drives the shielded-stance-visuals scripted-input scenario, which stages two player infantry units side by side (shield wall + testudo) so the two new cosmetic overlays are shown together.
caption: Dedicated visuals for the shielded close-order stances: a locked shield line along the front (SHIELD WALL, left) and an overhead shield roof over the block (TESTUDO, right), team-tinted and rotating with facing.
